nts1.n: Nāda Sonics w/ Sway of the Verses, Prattyush Banerjee & Giuliano Modarelli
nts1.d: Take a journey into Raga and Tala based music, and find out the intricacies of this ever evolving ancient musical tradition as we weave our way though musicians, instruments, ragas and time-cycles.

nts1.n: THE ONE GLOVE BREAKFAST SHOW W/ MACCA
nts1.d: Stay left and take a trip with Macca's Saturday breakfast show on NTS. Weekend musings and eclectic cuts from all over the place, it's a low-key affair and you're all invited. ONE GLOVE!!!

nts1.n: Highlife & Sunshine Show w/ Tryb & ZENA

nts2.d: A state of mind more than a grading scale, Mint Condition journeys deep into an abyss of new, classic, and obscure 12" and 7" records - with a focus toward high-end boogie, disco, two step, sweet soul, italo, house and modern funk.

nts2.n: EDGE OF THE FOREST: Fish String Theory
nts2.d:
Antoine Bertin weaves together field recordings and sonifications of data he collects around the world. Wandering in its own meditative way on the edge of science, technology and sound, the radio show explores where forests begin and when they end. From listening to the DNA of plants in Japan, to the seismic data of the Stromboli volcano or the movements of rivers in Alaska, The Edge of the Forest seeks to share sensations and ideas that inform our understanding of the natural world, humans included.
From the host: "Edge of the Forest takes you across the horizon, to listen with the forests, seas and caves of Aotearoa. Follow the guidance of resonating strings, connect to the origin of voices, read the future in the structure of harmonics, translate yourself into otherness."

subtle.n: Dun Roamin w/ Tomi From Brockley

subtle.d:
Midlands born, London based producer and DJ influenced by UK funky, broken techno, garage and early dubstep. 

Has released on Keysound recordings, RKS, eatmybeat, ec2a, Durkle Disco and Dimsum records
Hailing from Belfast but making moves in Nottingham, Nikki O is a DJ and radio presenter whose sets blend 4/4 rhythms, breakbeats, and the bassier side of techno.

DJ & Producer, B-Say has been a Subtle resident DJ for over 3 years.

His radio shows tend to focus on the 140 bass music scene and aims to showcase unreleased/forthcoming music from upcoming artists, as well as premiering his own unreleased material. 

More recently B-Say has ventured out from solely DJ'ing Dubstep, with his bi-monthly 'Dub & Steppers Show' which he uses to premier his own productions.

Slick is a London-based Producer and DJ combining the sounds of Grime and Drill.
Expect sets to span from sparse wave and weightless to classic NY and UK Drill, with everything in between
J:KENZO is a producer and record label owner (Artikal Music & Lion Charge) from the UK. Known for his minimalistic dark tribal sound in the both the dubstep and drum and bass scenes since 2006.

subtle.n: Pattern Recognition w/ R A L L Y
Mid Morning Matters w/ Alfie Danger
Taking the Peel w/ Badly Drawn Banana

subtle.d:
DJ and radio producer TILDA will be live from the studio to kick off your weekend. She’ll cover all corners of electronic music as well as showcasing unmissable new tracks & chatting about motives for the weekend. 

Each month TILDA will be closing the show with a signature mix.

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy

dublab.n: Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.
